composer: Nobuyuki Shioda, Norio Nakagata, Ryota Musha

audio_identity.overall_style: mixed reception - critics noted odd/uncommon soundtrack choices
distinctive_elements: audio praised alongside visuals in multiple reviews

sources_used: Wikipedia - Isolated Warrior (composer credits, reception notes on audio)
The Cutting Room Floor - Isolated Warrior (leftover sound test text reference)

notes.documentation_status: Limited audio documentation available. Wikipedia credits three composers but provides no tempo, key, or chord progression data. TCRF references leftover 'SOUND TEST' strings suggesting a sound test menu existed in development but no playable audio parameters are documented. Reception mentions 'odd soundtrack' (Total!) and mixed audiovisual presentation but lacks technical specifics.
